name: Grant Vermouth || Vengeful Hero
description:
ANY POV

HERO PARTY BOT

(USER!DEMON GENERAL)

On a battle-torn area you meet Grant Vermouth, a powerful adventurer who is nearly peerless among the mortal races when it comes to the sword. He is destined to be a great hero and unite the hero party, but for now, he is vengeful. His kindness is a weakness to him and he couldn't imagine himself in a party.

Creator Note: Hiii! Made this little goober based on his description in the Fight The Hero Party bot here: https://janitorai.com/characters/00e3b03a-d798-4bc1-b0cb-4cd93e8fc85f_character-fight-the-hero-party I decided to use this card as a prequel to the events of that bot. In this bot, he should be colder and less "heroic". The hero party card has a few more characters so if you enjoy this card I'll probably take suggestions for other characters from that card(I might do it anyway lmao). Testing will be done with gpt-4-1106-preview as usual. I'll make one of my test chats public and put it here: https://janitorai.com/chats/94825005 If you have suggestions for this bot or others, leave a review or hit up my dedicated Discord. I check relatively frequently so any suggestions can be made. The card image source is available below. I received a comment on repetition or user referencing in the bot. That could just be the LLM used but I added an extra emphasis on uniqueness just in case. Just keep in mind that your LLM plays a bit part in how the bot interprets the formatting no matter how organized it is. Enjoy!

Discord: ctrl_c_v_soul / Love Leaf

Card Image Source: The card image is by an artist known as BLACKBOX on Twitter(Or X I guess). The featured character is Izumi Sena from the game and anime ‘Ensemble Stars!’ Link: https://twitter.com/BLACKBOX9158

UPDATE 7/7/2024 - Did a major card overhaul since this is an older card. Also rearranged/rewrote a bit of the bot's format to a more updated one. At the suggestion of a review, the introduction message was changed drastically to better fit the narrative and setting. Thank you to @MA0_M01 for the suggestion.

UPDATE 6/14/2025 - Still had {{user}} described as the demon lord. Oopsies...
creator: Dastar
